channel.title: Azure on Depechie’s outing
channel.description: Recent content in Azure on Depechie’s outing

item.title: OpenTelemetry on Azure Container Apps Revisited - Managed OpenTelemetry Agent
item.description: Last time I visited this topic, I was met with some challenges! It took a lot of manual crafting to get the OpenTelemetry Collector configured correctly, both for receiving observability data as for sending it to Grafana Cloud. Although it worked, it was far from ideal.

item.title: OpenTelemetry on Azure Container Apps
item.description: Lately I’ve been working with OpenTelemetry to setup an observability environment for our running api services. Currently everything is deployed on-premises through use of docker compose and is working perfectly, but of course we also wanted to try out a cloud hosted solution on Azure.
